purpose: Define the initial alignment pass used to bring an existing independent service into the v0.7 governance shape without creating central runtime ownership, while allowing repository-wide scans and governance-folder attachment.

required_phases.outcome: service orchestration surfaces are present and reviewable
loop-breaking prompt surfaces are present and reviewable
continuous monitoring artifacts are present and valid

hard_rules: Normalization may use a temporary link but must not leave a persistent central runtime dependency.
Normalization may inspect the whole repository even when governance is attached only as governance/.
Normalization must improve service governance shape without forcing service-local implementation folders into a fixed runtime layout.
Normalization is incomplete until a normalization receipt exists.
Normalization must confirm the fixed DTP paths are present under governance/dtp before normalized status is granted.
Normalization may not mutate paths outside governance/ unless the approved mutation scope explicitly permits it.
Normalization must treat renamed substitutes for required kernel paths as non-compliant.
